name: microservices-project
description: API Gateway + Auth Service + Product Service mikroservis mimarisi

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix api-gateway && npm install --prefix auth-service && npm install --prefix product-service
scripts.start: concurrently -n GATEWAY,AUTH,PRODUCT -c blue,green,yellow "npm run start:gateway" "npm run start:auth" "npm run start:product"
